task: pick sponge from middle drawer and place on counter
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A gray table has a white bowl on it. Below, a drawer is open, containing a light brown sponge. The sponge is inside the drawer, which is a container. STRATEGY - First, reach into the drawer to grasp the sponge. Then, transport it to the table surface and place it there. Failure modes include not grasping the sponge, dropping it during transport, or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer to access the sponge; Step 2 grasp the sponge (which is inside the drawer, so interact with the drawer's interior); Step 3 transport the sponge to the table; Step 4 place the sponge on the table surface.
Goal: on(sponge, table)
Scene: table, bowl, drawer, sponge
Step 1: reach(drawer)
  affordance_region: the open front of the drawer
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, drawer, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, drawer) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(sponge)
  affordance_region: the light brown sponge inside the drawer
  contact: holding(sponge) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(sponge)
Step 3: transport(sponge -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  spatial: above(sponge, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(sponge)
  done_when: above(sponge, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(sponge -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table surface
  contact: surface_contact(sponge, table) [completion]; released(sponge) [completion]
  pose: stable(sponge) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(sponge, table) AND released(sponge)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the open front of the drawer
the light brown sponge inside the drawer
an empty area on the table surface
an empty area on the table surface
